strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js equivalents, with proven delivery of end-to-end enterprise systems including AI-agent tooling and automation platforms.

Deep hands-on expertise in testing frameworks (Vitest/Jest equivalents), CI/CD, TDD, and infrastructure-as-code (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), aligning directly with required engineering rigor and process improvement responsibilities.
Demonstrated ability to lead open-source technical initiatives (GISCollective) and mentor teams through workshops, showing strong collaboration, communication, and customer-oriented product thinking.
concerns: Current career gap since October 2025 raises questions about recent active engagement, though prior roles show consistent high-impact work.
Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or PostgreSQL/MongoDB in resume — though equivalent technologies (Node.js, testing tools, NoSQL) are extensively used, requiring inference.
German language proficiency is listed as basic, which may pose minor communication challenges in a Berlin-based enterprise environment.
response.justification: Bogdan’s 6+ years of full-stack development, including direct work with TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, Kubernetes, and AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, aligns precisely with the role’s core responsibilities and stack; his leadership in open-source tooling, testing practices, and process improvement demonstrates not just technical proficiency but the initiative and collaboration required to elevate enterprise engineering culture.
